creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I'm unable to find any file listed in the ${DISTFILES} and ${PATCHFILES}. After
some digging on AfterStep's ftp sites, I've found the following, which seems
explains this:

ftp://ftp.digex.net/pub/X11/window-managers/afterstep/devel/README:
"The AfterStep devel has moved to cvs, check the website
(www.afterstep.org) for instructions and site address."

Please clarify if the AfterStep team is going to make development snapshots
available from ftp in the future, and if no, then we would probably remove
afterstep-devel port from the tree.

-Maxim
